    "title": "MN Initiated Secondary Node Release Procedure - Successful Release Confirmed by SN",
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING",
    "preconditions": [
      "MN and SN are connected and UE is in EN-DC mode",
      "Data forwarding addresses are configured and available"

    "testSteps": [

      "From MN, send a SgNB Release Request message to SN including data forwarding addresses",
      "Verify SN sends back SgNB Release Request Acknowledge message confirming SN Release",
      "MN sends RRCConnectionReconfiguration message to UE indicating full SCG release",
      "Verify UE applies SCG release without reconfiguration failure",
      "Verify SN sends SN Status Transfer message for bearers using RLC AM",
      "Verify data forwarding from SN to MN starts",
      "Verify SN sends Secondary RAT Data Usage Report message to MN with correct data volumes",
      "If applicable, verify path update procedure is initiated",
      "Verify SN releases UE context and related radio and C-plane resources upon UE Context Release message"

      "SgNB Release Request Acknowledge message is received by MN confirming release",
      "UE successfully releases SCG configuration without failure",
      "SN Status Transfer message is sent for all RLC AM bearers",
      "Data forwarding from SN to MN starts promptly",

      "Path update procedure is initiated if required",
      "SN releases all radio and C-plane resources associated with UE context correctly"

      "UE operates without SCG configuration",
      "Data forwarding and reporting complete successfully"

    ]
